---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an idea for this project
title: "[FEATURE]"
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''

---

**What type of user are you?**
> A short "I am a [...]" sentence, describing how you use the app. E.g. I am a manager. I am a designer, I am a sales person 

**Describe the pain point your solution fixes**
> A sentence or two describing the part of the app you currently are struggling with or want to do more. E.g. I get annoyed when [...]. I would like to be able to [...]

**Describe the solution you'd like**
> A clear and concise description of what you want to happen.

**Describe alternatives you've considered**
> A clear and concise description of any alternative solutions or features you've considered.

**Additional context**
> Add any other context or screenshots about the feature request here. Screenshots, wire diagrams, videos, links. All of that lives here
